prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical portrait of a glamorous young East Asian woman, ANRI, standing on a wooden balcony in a traditional Japanese-style street or ryokan courtyard at dusk. She has a soft oval face, fair skin, large expressive brown eyes, neat makeup with red lipstick, and a sleek chin-length bob haircut in dark brown with a side part. She wears a fitted sleeveless white ribbed knit turtleneck mini dress, elegant and form-fitting, emphasizing a curvy hourglass silhouette. Pose her facing the camera with a gentle confident smile, one hand lightly touching her chin and the other arm folded across her waist. The setting features dark wooden posts and railings, stone paving, warm lantern lights, restaurant seating on the left, traditional tiled roofs and wooden buildings in the background, a few red lanterns, and soft greenery. Use warm ambient evening lighting, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, detailed knit fabric texture, natural proportions, high-end fashion portrait style, sharp focus on the subject, 3:4 vertical composition, no text, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a photorealistic vertical portrait of a glamorous young East Asian woman, ANRI, standing on a wooden balcony in a traditional Japanese-style street or ryokan courtyard at dusk. She has a soft oval face, fair skin, large expressive brown eyes, neat makeup with red lipstick, and a sleek chin-length bob haircut in dark brown with a side part. She wears a fitted sleeveless white ribbed knit turtleneck mini dress, elegant and form-fitting, emphasizing a curvy hourglass silhouette. Pose her facing the camera with a gentle confident smile, one hand lightly touching her chin and the other arm folded across her waist. The setting features dark wooden posts and railings, stone paving, warm lantern lights, restaurant seating on the left, traditional tiled roofs and wooden buildings in the background, a few red lanterns, and soft greenery. Use warm ambient evening lighting, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, detailed knit fabric texture, natural proportions, high-end fashion portrait style, sharp focus on the subject, 3:4 vertical composition, no text, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张照片级逼真的竖版肖像，主角是一位迷人的年轻东亚女性，ANRI。她站在黄昏时分传统日式街道或旅馆庭院的木制阳台上。她拥有柔和的鹅蛋脸、白皙的皮肤、明亮且富有表现力的棕色大眼睛，妆容精致，涂着红色唇膏，留着利落的下巴长度波波头，发色为 深棕色，侧分刘海。她身穿一件修身的无袖白色罗纹针织迷你连衣裙，优雅且贴合身形，突显出迷人的沙漏型身材。让她面向镜头，带着自信柔和的微笑，一只手轻轻触碰下巴，另一只手臂交叉放在腰间。场景包含深色木柱和栏杆、石板路、温暖的灯笼光、左侧的餐厅座位、背景中传统的瓦片屋顶和木质建筑、几盏红灯笼以及柔和的绿植。使用温暖的傍晚环境光，浅景深，真实的皮肤质感，细腻的针织面料纹理，自然的比例，高端时尚肖像风格，主体对焦清晰，3:4 竖版构图，无文字，无水印。
